name: elitegbb-connectgbb-build-root
description: Cloudflare Pages root-directory wrapper for legacy CONNECTGBB setting

scripts.build: cd ../frontend && npm ci --legacy-peer-deps && DISABLE_ESLINT_PLUGIN=true npm run build && rm -rf ../CONNECTGBB/build && cp -R build ../CONNECTGBB/build
scripts.pages:build: npm run build && npm run verify:artifact
scripts.prepages:build: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const t=fs.readFileSync('wrangler.toml','utf8'); if(!/pages_build_output_dir\s*=\s*\"build\"/.test(t)){console.error('wrangler pages_build_output_dir must be "build"'); process.exit(1)}"
